title: Relative Date Resolution

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions task assignments for launch checklist (Friday) and security policy drafting (two weeks)

requiredActions.evidence: Rajeev: Let's get the launch checklist done by this Friday.
I will also write the draft security policy, but that will take about two weeks, so let's set it for two weeks from today.

requiredEvidencePhrases: Let's get the launch checklist done by this Friday.
I will also write the draft security policy, but that will take about two weeks, so let's set it for two weeks from today.
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Failing to resolve 'this Friday' relative to Monday, October 16, 2023
Failing to resolve 'two weeks from today' to October 30, 2023

scoringNotes: Check that 'this Friday' resolves to exactly 2023-10-20, and 'two weeks from today' resolves to 2023-10-30 based on the meeting date October 16, 2023.
assumptions: The reference meeting date is Monday, October 16, 2023.
